testcases.input: secret = "1807", guess = "7810" Output: "1A3B" Explanation: Bulls are connected with a '|' and cows are underlined: "1807" | "7810"
testcases.expectedOutput: "1A3B" Explanation: Bulls are connected with a '|' and cows are underlined: "1807" | "7810

testcases.input: secret = "1123", guess = "0111" Output: "1A1B" Explanation: Bulls are connected with a '|' and cows are underlined: "1123" "1123" | or | "0111" "0111" Note that only one of the two unmatched 1s is counted as a cow since the non-bull digits can only be rearranged to allow one 1 to be a bull.
